content: But what ends up being nore valuable for teambuilding and general content. An invest pontos team or an invested corpo team excluding pontos

Tornado is the Exalt

She helps alot with managing your Health

ooooh
So she's nice to have in places where you lack any real way to Sustain
so I go for ramona instead of helot
No, keep base Helot
Her Exalt raises the Damage of Strikes, and by extention your Flails which is GHelot's main source of Damage (after casting her own Exalt)

Depending on how many teams you can reasonably form, I would suggest starting with wave 5 and use your best team and see how hard you can reasonably do it. Then work backwards using your second best team for Wave 4 and so on
even if you can only do alert 1 with each team you should get a good amount of points
Ahh oki
Wave 1 Altert 1 you should be able to do with around a level 40 team

I used Clem + Pickman for one of my teams:
those were all the teams I used, but I have been leveling a lot of characters (been playing about 2.5 months)

interlude
If you have a wave you are really struggling with, don't forget to use a support character. Preferably just grab a whale version of a character you know well
This means you can use the same character on 2 different waves by using a support
Could alternatively just pick up a whaled out Mouchette, then run any 3 Characters with Burial Grounds equipped
Credits to Ellie
Oooo alright, ill try this out! I dudnt think alva was a gud thing?
Where can i find these teams o:
Oh, she's just a filler
You don't need to copy the comp bar for bar
All you need is 3 Sets of Burials
Character, Awakener / Skill / Soulforge Levels don't need to be 1 for 1 either
Press your profile picture, replay, copy paste the code to view the video
Alva only gets good later on if you can get a crap ton of shield and invest in her, she's not great early on

alva is used because her exalt applies vulnerable

kinda, Sacrifice will hit you for its stack amount and get halved, so Murphy's exalt is absolutely a panic button

My issue with Corposant, Tulu and Aurita is that I kept dying and had no way of shielding myself from hits. Keep in mind my Corpo is E0 right now <:sweats:1389724381273653488> 

I tried D-Zone 2 with Celeste, Corpo, Tulu and Aurita.
Murphy's rouse is pretty nice, tho, up to 3 temp Tentacles and 3 energy equivalent keyflare per turn
Her 3 cost removes a percentage of Sacrifice
That's what makes her E1 a qol of being able to retain it

Tulu 3 cost and Murphy weak will be an important damage mitigator, and your tranquil stance

corpo's pilots and her rouse is also your shielding option
You just have to figure out when to Murphy Exalt, have enough sustain for the next turn and being able to play the 3 cost
push comes to shove, death resistance is still a thing on corpo

And are the current banner wheels good?
Yup
You totally could
You got two great Teams that you can make

- Corpo, Aurita, Murphy, Saya
- Corpo, Aurita, Murphy, Cassiah
Just raise Aurita to E3, ideally OE
With Shop Dupes, and you're good to go
Corpo is a ton of fun imo

She is also good with pontos
You could also consider obtaining Cassiah's E3
You're just one Enlightenment away
You could, kinda slows down your Discard though
I run Corpo, Pontos, Saya, Salvador
And for him to work into it
You'd also want him to have E3
So, I wouldn't recommend
Unless you really like dilfgaming and such
thank you <:Leigh_love:1468258513405870121>
Ah mb, meant to say E3
When you Discard her Telekinesis, it Aftershocks and grants you Insights
Really helpful

- draw Gaunt at the start of each Turn
- Gaunt triggers Aftershock, and reduces Cost by 1
You're welcome man

Also Is pulling wheels dupes good?
I have the wheels of saya, ghelot, corpo and pollux all e0

- Saya really likes having her WoD
- Pollux does too, it's his BiS
- GHelot BiS is Celestial Beast which you can raise for free at the Lightless Realm Shop, and her own Sig is her 2nd BiS so you can run both
- Corpo BiS is Horla Sig WoD, together with Blade which you'd otherwise wanna raise to +12 anyways
Wheel dupe nice but unit dupes are far more impactful
Yup
Exception atm being Saya wheel E3 over her own E3
Oh, fr? I didn't actually know about that one
I just immediately raised her and her WoD to E3
Without asking any questions beforehand
thx
just gotta find some time to beat w2a4 twice with lemurians and bleed and good to go
yeah, because her WoD goies from +40% corro on her to fking +100%
Oh, fr? That's pretty goated actually
it scales off base aliemus so it's so good because she's base 200

E1 gives her Sigil scaling
E3 wheels gives her even bigger Corrosion ~~the only important part of kit~~
Other dupes are nice but more Corrosion is bigger oomph <:Saya_caught:1513123193341349968>
also makes her embryo fusion go from +18% to +30%
Good shit
which is fine, I guess, great in teams where she's the only caro(even though she's the reason babies need 200 fusion)
